name: How often do I need to update hours and location info for voice search?
description: Update hours whenever they change and before holidays or seasonal shifts. Accurate current hours are important for voice-driven local results.

mainEntity.name: How often do I need to update hours and location info for voice search?

acceptedAnswer.text: You should update hours whenever they change, especially before holidays, emergencies, or seasonal shifts. Voice search often surfaces current hours, so stale information can cause missed visits and frustrated callers.
acceptedAnswer.description: Update hours whenever they change and before holidays or seasonal shifts. Accurate current hours are important for voice-driven local results.
